task_completion.description: Create the System Context diagram (Page 1) with required entities.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Draw.io canvas showing a System Context diagram with nodes representing Mastodon, End User, Mobile App Client, Remote Fediverse Instance, Email Provider, and Object Storage. Look for keywords: mastodon, user, fediverse, email, storage.

task_completion.description: Create the Container diagram (Page 2) with required containers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Draw.io canvas showing a Container diagram with nodes representing Web Application, Streaming API, Sidekiq Workers, PostgreSQL, Redis, Elasticsearch, and Nginx. Look for keywords: web, streaming, sidekiq, postgres, redis, elastic, nginx. A page tab for this second diagram should be visible.

task_completion.description: Create the Component diagram (Page 3) for the Web Application with required components.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Draw.io canvas showing a Component diagram with nodes representing Authentication, REST API, ActivityPub, Media, Timeline, Notification, Account, and Status. Look for keywords: auth, api, activitypub, media, timeline, notification, account, status. A page tab for this third diagram should be visible.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as mastodon_c4.drawio to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io window title displays 'mastodon_c4.drawio', or a file manager/desktop view shows the 'mastodon_c4.drawio' file located on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: Export the diagram as mastodon_c4.png to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or desktop view shows the 'mastodon_c4.png' file located on the Desktop, or an image viewer/export dialog confirms the creation of this PNG file.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagrams.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the draw.io application open with the toolbars and canvas visible, indicating manual or GUI-automated creation rather than generating an XML file via a text editor or terminal script.

integrity.description: The diagrams consist of actual shapes and connectors.
integrity.visual_evidence: The diagrams should be composed of distinct shapes (e.g., rectangles, database cylinders) connected by lines/arrows, rather than a single large text block pasted onto the canvas.

integrity.description: The agent utilized the multi-page feature of draw.io.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for multiple page tabs (e.g., Page-1, Page-2, Page-3) at the bottom of the draw.io interface, confirming all diagrams are in a single file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires a 3-page C4 model diagram. Page 1 (System Context) must include keywords: mastodon, user, fediverse, email, storage. Page 2 (Container) must include keywords: web, streaming, sidekiq, postgres, redis, elastic, nginx. Page 3 (Component) must include keywords: auth, api, activitypub, media, timeline, notification, account, status. The final outputs must be named exactly 'mastodon_c4.drawio' and 'mastodon_c4.png' and saved to the Desktop.
